characters.name: Beef and the Chums
characters.description: Beef and the Chums are a gang of bikers that first appear in the episodeLost in Transportation, after Mikey was upset when there no more room left in Lily's room so he tries to find his way to the park, but accidentally ends up in the coffee shop with a gang full of bikers, they try to attack him but Mikey uses his kung fu moves and they make him an honorary chum, and give him a motorcycle and a whistle. They were later seen inHog Day Afternoon.Biographical informationNameBeef and the ChumsGenderMalesOccupationBiker GangRelativesFriendsMikey SimonShow informationFirst appearanceLost in TransportationLatest appearanceHog Day Afternoon

Brozu's personality completely contrasts with his brother Ozu, as he has a laidback side in contrast to his more serious brother. Brozu's personality completely contrasts with his brother Ozu, as he has a laidback side in contrast to his more serious brother. Brozu also has a strong love of dancing, often seen doing so. He also speaks in a rapper lingo to others.

characters.name: Cat Burglar
characters.description: TheCat Burglaris an antagonist inKappa Mikey. He is a bandit who is named like that because he steals cats. The Cat Burglar also has affinity for eating cats- as shown in the episode "Lily Meow" (S1E9) The Cat Burglar does not like to be arrested- and also seems to enjoy stir-fries, as he suggests that Kello the Kitten be made into one in the episode "Lily Meow" The Cat Burglar does not like to be arrested- and also seems to enjoy stir-fries, as he suggests that Kello the Kitten be made into one in the episode "Lily Meow" The Cat Burglar has allergy problems- though it is unclear if he is actually allergic to cats.

characters.name: Clawd Vawn 'Farbio
characters.description: Clawd Vawn 'Farbiois a character inKappa Mikey. He only appeared in "Camp!". He is a director who hired two children in a gorilla and T-Rex costume. He states that after Lily stating it wasa disgusting spathat it is actually a school for young actors, he also states that Television (TV), isn't real acting, but acting is life, & life is life. when his name wasn't pronounced correctly by Mikey he would correct him with two kid actors one looking like a mime, and another like a William Shakespeare with a skull in his hand, (too be or not to be that is the question). Mikey said he is not taking actor lesson's from a poser in a ponytail.

characters.name: Dr. Igor
characters.description: Dr. Igoris an evil scientist who lives on the secret 13th floor ofLilyMu Towers. Igor appears to be very lonely, and vengeful after being forgotten about for so long. Though when he meets Guano, he changes his evil ways. Prior to his introduction in the series, Dr. Igor had worked on monster movies. He states that he created all the original movie monsters such as MegaRat, MegaSnake, and MegaMom, with the help ofForbeswho designed the monsters' butts. Unfortunately, he was forgotten about, and didn't get the respect or credit for the monsters he made. As a result, he became evil. InBig Trouble In Little Tokyo, Mikey and his friends discover Dr. Igor living on the secret 13th floor of LilyMu Towers with Forbes. Igor kidnaps Guano to use his gem in one of his inventions, but Guano convinces him that he doesn't have to be evil. When Gonard is hit with the size-mo-laser and becomes a giant monster, Dr. Igor helps Team Lilymu turn him back to normal, and says he is glad that he didn't destroy the city. Igor appears to be very lonely, and vengeful after being forgotten about for so long. Though when he meets Guano, he changes his evil ways.
characters.personality_section: Igor appears to be very lonely, and vengeful after being forgotten about for so long. Though when he meets Guano, he changes his evil ways.

characters.name: Gonard
characters.description: Gonard(ゴナード/Gonādo) is one of the protagonists who plays the part of LilyMu’s main antagonist. As an actor onLilyMu, Gonard plays a muscular, purple skinned creature referred to as Super Gonard. Off camera, Gonard is a tall and normal human being. LikeMitsuki, his hair is blue. It is also shown to be messy, and his ears are always pointed resembling that of an Elf's ears, though he has no eyebrows, he has a noticeably large brow bone. On LilyMu, he is portrayed as a diabolical villain who plans to rule the world or cause destruction. He even resorts to kidnapping as well. Off camera however, he's friendly and innocent, yet very dimwitted and childish.
characters.personality_section: On LilyMu, he is portrayed as a diabolical villain who plans to rule the world or cause destruction. He even resorts to kidnapping as well. Off camera however, he's friendly and innocent, yet very dimwitted and childish.

characters.name: Guano
characters.description: Guano Mighty Go Go GuanoMasked TanukiGuan ManStink Face Cry BabyMega GuanoMistake (possibly) Ozu(father)Kiyoko(mother)Brozu(uncle) Compared to his carefree personality on screen, in real life, Guano a nervous wreck and has multiple responsibilities / jobs forLilyMu. Probably because he is the creator (likely), director, sole writer and an actor that this builds up his stress. Unlike his friends, he doesn't like publicity and prefers to stay out of the limelight. He has intense feelings of sadness at times and has a few odd habits. Guano rarely gets jealous over anything or is selfish. Also of his cast mates he is usually the one to get the worst treatment from their boss Ozu. Despite all his fears and everything, Guano is a smart, hard worker / leader and takes work very seriously just as his producer / father does. He doesn't let everyone push him around all the time. Like Mitsuki though, he can be the voice of reason within his best friends and sometimes has to act as the leader. Guano is also very friendly and nice, having a sort of sweet, emotional approach around him, especially adorable natured things. His creative directingandwritinghas been a big part of the success ofLilyMu. It is quite remarkable that despite Guano's secrets, fears, and everything else, he puts a side his flaws because he really has a passion for his work. Guano also has a feeling for justice as the episode theMasked Tanukirevealed he is secretly a Tokyo famous superhero. He says he "was tired of feeling helpless". He also has a dungeon / super lair underneath his apartment. It is unknown if Guano's secrets are a result of his fear of everything or he is fearful by nature/genetics. Some of these "secrets" could be from his past regarding his family or just things in general.
